rulings.Case Title: FRANK AYALA ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 16, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MARK EVJU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 16, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT MARK EVJU MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DENIED. Moving party has shifted its burden, opposing party presented competent evidence creating a triable issue of fact re: marijuana growing and fact #31. Evidence submitted in opposition to motion for summary judgment is entitled to liberal interpretation and all reasonable inferences. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIDNEY CHAN VS. ANNETTE CHOI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday March 16, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT ANNETTE CHOI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer for non-payment of rent under an oral agreement. Defendant improperly raises issues of fact outside the allegations in complaint. = (501/REQ)
